title: The Salaries and Allowances of Ministers Act, 1952
full_text: The Salaries and Allowances of Ministers Act, 1952 मंत्रियों के सम्बलमों और भत्तों से - सम्बन्धित अधिनियम, 1952 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1952-58 Act Number: 58 Enactment Date: 1952-08-12 Act Year: 1952 Short Title: The Salaries and Allowances of Ministers Act, 1952 Hindi Title: मंत्रियों के सम्बलमों और भत्तों से - सम्बन्धित अधिनियम, 1952 Long Title: An Act to provide for the salaries and allowances of Ministers. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Home Enforcement Date: 12-08-1952 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Salaries and Allowances of Ministers Act, 1952 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definition. Show Related Subordinates Section 3. Salaries and daily constituency allowances. Section 4. Residence of Ministers. Section 5. Sumptuary allowance to Ministers. Section 6. Travelling and daily allowances to Ministers. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Medical treatment, etc., to Ministers. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Advances to Ministers for purchase of motor-cars. Section 9. Ministers not to draw salary or allowances as Members of Parliament. Section 10. Notification respecting appointment, etc., of Ministers to be conclusive evidence thereof. Section 10A. Exemption from liability to pay income-tax on certain perquisites received by a Minister. Section 11. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Regularisation of certain payments. Show Related Subordinates Section 13. [Repealed.].
